description: A group of Ukrainian oligarchs, politicians, and organized crime figures, and formerly Soviet politicians, based in Dnipro (formerly Dnipropetrovsk). It emerged after the Great Purge and was firmly established in the 1950s-1960s under Leonid Brezhnev. The group wielded powerful influence in Ukraine and was involved in black market activities. It declined after Brezhnev's death and Gorbachev's rise.
